# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Skills (auto-generated by `/sync-skills`)

When a task matches a skill below, you MUST invoke it via the Skill tool BEFORE taking any other action. Pay attention to override instructions (what NOT to do) in each entry.

- `/hikyaku` — Interact with the Hikyaku A2A message broker. Use when an agent needs to register, send/receive messages, poll inbox, acknowledge messages, or discover other agents.

## Plugin Skills (auto-generated by `/sync-skills`)

When a task matches a skill below, you MUST invoke it via the Skill tool BEFORE taking any other action. Pay attention to override instructions (what NOT to do) in each entry.

- `/hikyaku:hikyaku` — Interact with the Hikyaku A2A message broker. Use when an agent needs to register, send/receive messages, poll inbox, acknowledge messages, or discover other agents.

## Project: Hikyaku

A2A-native message broker + agent registry for coding agents.

- **Design document**: `design-docs/0000001-a2a-registry-broker/design-doc.md` (Status: Complete)
- **Design document**: `design-docs/0000002-access-control/design-doc.md` — Tenant isolation via shared API key (Status: Complete)
- **Monorepo structure** (uv workspace):
  - `registry/` — `hikyaku-registry` (FastAPI + Redis + a2a-sdk)
  - `client/` — `hikyaku-client` (click + httpx + a2a-sdk)
  - `mcp-server/` — `hikyaku-mcp` (mcp + httpx + httpx-sse)
- **CLI command**: `hikyaku`
- **MCP server command**: `hikyaku-mcp`

## Tech Stack

- Python 3.12+ with uv workspace
- Server: FastAPI + Redis + a2a-sdk
- CLI: click + httpx + a2a-sdk
- MCP Server: mcp + httpx + httpx-sse

## Commands

**IMPORTANT**: Always use mise full-path tasks. Run from the project root — do NOT `cd` into package directories.

- Run registry tests: `mise //registry:test`
- Run client tests: `mise //client:test`
- Run MCP server tests: `mise //mcp-server:test`
- Lint (root): `mise //:lint`
- Lint (registry): `mise //registry:lint`
- Lint (client): `mise //client:lint`
- Lint (admin): `mise //admin:lint`
- Lint (mcp-server): `mise //mcp-server:lint`
- Format check (root): `mise //:format`
- Type check: `mise //:typecheck`
- Sync workspace: `uv sync` (from project root)
- Start broker server: `mise //registry:dev`
- Start MCP server: `mise //mcp-server:dev`
- Start admin dev server: `mise //admin:dev`
- Build admin: `mise //admin:build`
